# SubscriptionCustomerEligibility | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ App Store Connect API ](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi)

- [ SubscriptionCustomerEligibility ](/documentation/AppStoreConnectAPI/SubscriptionCustomerEligibility)

-  SubscriptionCustomerEligibility 

Type# SubscriptionCustomerEligibility

App Store Connect API 2.0+

```
string SubscriptionCustomerEligibility
```

## [ Possible Values ](/documentation/AppStoreConnectAPI/SubscriptionCustomerEligibility#possibleValues)

`NEW``EXISTING``EXPIRED`## [Possible values](/documentation/AppStoreConnectAPI/SubscriptionCustomerEligibility#Possible-values)

`NEW`A customer who has not previously subscribed to this subscription.

`EXISTING`A customer who is currently subscribed to this subscription.

`EXPIRED`A customer who was but is not currently subscribed to this subscription.
